findings.description: s1 content explicitly mentions @Test and @Before as JUnit4 annotation examples but neither appears in s1's hints. They exist only in s3 hints. Users asking about JUnit4 framework features involving these annotations would not be routed to s1.
findings.source_evidence: s1 content: 'JUnit4のアノテーション（`@Test`、`@Before`等）、assertメソッド、Matcherクラスなど'

findings.description: s1 content mentions assertメソッド alongside Matcherクラス, but only Matcher is in s1's hints. assertメソッド is absent, creating an inconsistency where one term from the same phrase is indexed but the other is not.
findings.source_evidence: s1 content: 'assertメソッド、Matcherクラスなど、JUnit4で提供されている機能を使用する'; s1 hints include Matcher but not assertメソッド
